merged_prs.title: [UBSAN]Properly initialize datamembers for move operator
Add a new test for reduced ProcessHistory
Use `WaitingTaskHolder` to signal `doneWaiting()` instead of `WaitingTaskWithArenaHolder` in framework
Updated test of edm::Ref use from a merged ROOT file
Add muonBestTrackType value
Remove all `SealModules` from the `RecoMuon` package
re-organize `RecoMuon/L3TrackFinder` such that all plugins are defined in `plugins` folder
Improve L1TRawToDigi
Update SiPixelAliHGRcd_prod.json
Introduce a `Generic` validation tool for dataset validation in the alignment all-in-one tool
Removing CUDA/`gpu` from Pixel code configs and dropping all CUDA wfs
[GENERATORS] Apply code checks/format
[UBSAN]Fix runtime error for invalid bool value assignment
speedup SiStripClusterizer(FromRaw) using ThreeThresholdAlgorithm
Add support for adding variable-size attributes (std::vector) within objects for NanoAOD
Removed TFWLiteSelector system
Remove redundant data members from InputFileCatalog to reduce memory use
Make HGCAL Validation reproducible
